findings.description: Premise-audit before P8 caught that the TODO Consequences were in FIVE ADRs, not the two the PLAN named — the exit criterion ('no ADR carries a TODO') drove filling all five.

The session's own work was the realized consequences of the ADRs being filled — P1 realized 0006's doctor-skew corollary, P5 realized 0004/0005, P6 realized 0002/0003 — so the Consequences are documented history, not speculation.
findings.evidence: each ADR Consequences cites the realizing phase.

findings.description: For operator-owned artifacts (ADR Consequences), drafting + a structured commit/hold question beats either silently committing or leaving blanks — the operator gets concrete text to react to while keeping the architectural call.
findings.evidence: AskUserQuestion → commit-drafts-revise-on-PR; the 0004 divergence is the one flagged for the revision pass.

findings.description: ADR-0004 now self-records a decision-vs-shipped divergence (per-tier verbs decided, scoping flags shipped). Reconcile: either supersede 0004 toward the flag shape or build the verbs. Operator to decide on the PR.
